name: Feature Delivery
description: Single feature delivery: analyze → build data layer → build routes → build UI → verify → ship.

start.name: Start
start.description: Confirm featureName, resource fields, auth requirements, and HTTP methods with user.

service_verify.name: Verify Service
service_verify.description: Run build command. Verify all CRUD routes are registered.

build_pages.name: Build Pages
build_pages.description: Read plugins/web-studio/steps/feature/build-page.md for each page needed by the feature.

pages_verify.name: Verify Pages
pages_verify.description: Visual verification of all feature pages via Chrome DevTools.

smoke_test.name: Smoke Test
smoke_test.description: Navigate to each feature route, screenshot, check console.

end_success.name: Feature Delivered
end_success.description: Feature is built, visually verified, and committed.

hitl_blocked.name: Blocked
hitl_blocked.description: A step failed. Review and decide how to proceed.
